documentation.description:
TITLE symbol table routines
AUTHOR: John Self (UCI)
DESCRIPTION implements only a simple symbol table using open hashing
NOTES could be faster, but it isn't used much
$Header: /co/ua/self/arcadia/aflex/ada/src/RCS/symS.a,v 1.4 90/01/12 15:20:42 self Exp Locker: self $

subprograms.name: Addsym
Cclinstal

subprograms.name: Ccllookup
subprograms.code: function Ccllookup (Ccltxt : in Vstring) return Integer

subprograms.name: Findsym
subprograms.code:
function Findsym
  (Symbol : in Vstring; Table : in Hash_Table; Table_Size : in Integer)
   return Hash_Link

subprograms.name: Hashfunct
subprograms.code:
function Hashfunct
  (Str : in Vstring; Hash_Size : in Integer) return Integer

subprograms.name: Ndlookup
subprograms.code: function Ndlookup (Nd : in Vstring) return Vstring

subprograms.name: Scinstal
subprograms.code: procedure Scinstal (Str : in Vstring; Xcluflg : in Boolean)

subprograms.name: Sclookup
subprograms.code: function Sclookup (Str : in Vstring) return Integer
